title: Limit People column to a subset of users
excerpt: I’d like to be able to select which users are available in a specific people column, either by selecting individually or by selecting a user group.

posts.author: jthorn (Josiah Thorngate)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to be able to select which users are available in a specific people column, either by selecting individually or by selecting a user group.

posts.author: Kos (Kos)
posts.cookedHtml:
Great thinking, I also would like this function.

I think this is a very handy quality of life impovement if your team is bigger than 5 people.

posts.author: Kelderic (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml: Would really like this. We have 60 users, but only a small group might be able to approve things in an approver column.
